strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js/TypeScript and React
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts library)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
No Kotlin listed; Java experience is dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ year full-stack requirement with deep Node.js/TypeScript and React work at Optilyz and re:cinq, and directly matches the AI-agent requirement via MCP code generators at re:cinq. Database (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), Docker, Kubernetes, and Git are all present. Gaps: Nest.js is not mentioned, Kotlin is absent, and Java is dated. Testing expertise is strong (TDD advocacy, custom assertion library) though Vitest/Playwright aren't named. Overall a strong match worth interviewing to probe the Nest.js and Kotlin gaps.
